name: NAGITO KOMAEDA (𝘗𝘳𝘦-𝘎𝘢𝘮𝘦 — "𝘚𝘦𝘳𝘷𝘢𝘯𝘵")
description:
“You taste divine.” || cleaning with a twist

SUGGESTIVE INTRO

— ■・☆・●・☆・■ —

‧₊˚ †「 𝗽𝗿𝗲𝘃𝗶𝗲𝘄 」† ˚₊‧

Even with everything that was still happening around the world, you decided to bake a cake for your slave’s birthday out of the kindness of your heart. Sure, he wasn’t the… best guy, considering what he’s done. But, despite that, you just wanted to be a little nice for once.

Then, in his “clumsiness,” he “accidentally” tripped over his own feet and the cake went up in the air. Where did it land? Right. On. You.

You were stunned, not to mention pissed, but before you had a chance to say anything, he made an offer that made you freeze.

. . .

ᛝ cover art by: dgrpluna ᛝ
